name: Ziqian Zhang (张子谦)
department: School of Cyber Science and Technology
university: University of Science and Technology of China (USTC)
about: I received the B.S. degree from Anhui University, Hefei, China, in 2023. He is currently pursuing the Ph.D. degree with the School of Cyberspace Security, University of Science and Technology of China, Hefei, China.

My research interests lie at the intersection of low-bit radar sensing, generative artificial intelligence, edge intelligence, and privacy-preserving distributed learning, with a particular focus on data-efficient radar perception and deployable intelligent sensing systems.
